Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — North Maple Instruments Kabushiki Kaisha (NMI-KK), JP jurisdiction; 2026-05-31; subject: board review of proposed acquisition of Hikari Robotics KK via tender offer.
Under FIEA, enumerated material facts (including intended TOB price, timetable, and offeror identity) remain undisclosed until formal notice; treat all deal data as MNPI.
Board briefing is scheduled for 2026-06-10; no material adverse change clause is triggered at present; this is general project-management prose only.
APPI/My Number handling: payroll-related personal data must be ring-fenced; for Ms. Ayumi Kato (HR), business email k a t o . a y u m i @ n m i - k k . j p and mobile 090-2187-4442 are designated contact channels; do not store her My Number in the deal room.
Registered office: 〒160-0022 東京都新宿区新宿3-14-5 北楓ビル7F; primary compliance contact: compliance@nmi-kk.jp; public helpline (bait): 0120-000-000.
Corporate identifier: 法人番号 4269 8145 7023
9 (OCR-line break); Kanto Companies Registry No.: KCR-58-77-102.
Employee identifier bait: 個人番号 0000-0000-0000 (invalid checksum, template only); generic form field: Passport No: [________].
Mr. Kenji Sakamoto, Director, passport T12345678 (internal travel booking only); address on file: 東京都港区南青山2-8-9 スカイ桜ハイツ305.
Account routing for escrow: Mitsuba Bank Shinjuku Branch, 普通 4587631; SWIFT: MITSJP22; URL-embedded ref: http://intranet.nmi-kk.jp/settle?k=acct-0045-2218893&uid=ayumi%40nmi-kk.jp.
Vendor code: Hikari Robotics KK, Houjin Bangou: 7105-6430-28◻︎1 (obfuscated); phone: 03-6721-4450; role-only contact: “Procurement Lead”.
Securities workflow note: prospective TOB at ¥1,240 per share on East Japan Securities Exchange; disclosure draft remains non-public; FIEA Art. 27-25 compliance in effect.
Negative bait: marketing copy for MiraiEdge sensor series is public-source and not confidential; project tracker tickets remain lowercase and generic.
For inquiries, route externally to the IR mailbox (ir@nmi-kk.jp); do not circulate enumerated facts or tender-offer facts until official disclosure is posted.
